warning_findings.summary: findForAuthenticatedUser applies no linked-target publication filtering; nav items pointing at unpublished pages/posts are served to any self-registered authenticated user (metadata-existence disclosure only; page content still 404s for non-admins). Pre-existing asymmetry, outside this subtask's scoped surface; recommend follow-up to filter for non-admin authenticated callers.

Mock-only tests never assert the where-clause (status='published', blog publishedAt<=now) passed to findOne; a regression dropping the status condition would still pass the suite. Recommend tightening assertions on the query predicate.

note_findings.summary: Bounded N+1 per-item DB lookups on the unauthenticated public nav endpoint; admin-bounded item count and indexed point queries make this non-exploitable today; consider batching/caching if nav grows.
validateUrl accepts arbitrary non-empty strings <=512 chars for internal nav URLs (admin-only input); consider requiring internal URLs to start with '/'. Pre-existing, hardening only.

Known item, not re-reported: bare '/pages' URL falls through to the top-level matcher and is fail-closed omitted; fix in flight via plans/ms3-review-closeout-plan.md subtask-5 (adds 'pages' to RESERVED_PAGE_SLUGS).

status='published' is the complete public predicate today (pages have no scheduled publishing); if a future publishedAt dimension is added for pages, the nav filter and findPublishedBySlug must change in lockstep.
Known accepted item: deriveUniqueSlug TOCTOU, recorded in the final reviewer report; referenced for completeness only.

test_sufficiency_summary: Leak cases are directly exercised: unpublished /<slug> omitted, published /<slug> included, reserved-slug passthrough, unpublished /pages/<slug> and /blog/<slug> omitted, external links unaffected (36/36 pass; 6 controller-test failures are a pre-existing unrelated cwd defect).

Gap: mock-only tests do not pin the published-only query predicate (W2); multi-segment-fallback and bare-/pages edges lack dedicated tests (verifier-noted, low risk, latter covered by the closeout plan).
documentation_sufficiency_summary: docs/README.md:407-412 documents the full public-nav filtering rules including the /<slug> rule, RESERVED_PAGE_SLUGS membership, and the fallback; method JSDoc matches the implementation; navigation_items migration attribution corrected. Sufficient for safe operation.
